evidence_hint: Two divergent hand-rolled YAML serializers: src/normalize_meta.ts:31 yamlScalar(v) (bare when safe) vs src/inventory.ts:159 `${k}: ${JSON.stringify(v)}` (always double-quoted, lists via JSON.stringify). Two parsers: src/inject.ts:20 parseExistingMeta and src/meta_schema.ts:90 parseCanonicalYaml, each with own coercion.
residual_if_not_resolved: Consolidate on one YAML serializer and one parser shared by normalize_meta, inventory, inject, and meta_schema.
